LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NANCY HEATH'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO THE SPECIAL INTERROGATORY. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO PARAGRAPHS 4 AND 5 OF PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ARE SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PRESENT EVIDENCE OF A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
